+ /// <summary>Upsert an API key for a connected account</summary>
28
+ /// <remarks>
29
+ /// Creates or updates an API-key-based installation for the specified integration and user. If an installation already exists, the stored API key is rotated to the new value.
30
+ /// </remarks>
31
+ /// <param name="slug">The identifier of the integration.</param>
32
+ /// <param name="options">Request options.</param>
33
+ /// <param name="requestOptions">Per-request configuration overrides.</param>
34
+ /// <param name="cancellationToken">Cancellation token.</param>
35
+ /// <returns>The <see cref="ConnectedAccount"/> result.</returns>
36
+ public virtual async Task<ConnectedAccount> UpdateDataIntegrationApiKeyAsync(string slug, PipesUpdateDataIntegrationApiKeyOptions options, RequestOptions? requestOptions = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
37
+ {
38
+ return await this.PutAsync<ConnectedAccount>($"/data-integrations/{Uri.EscapeDataString(slug)}/api-key", options, requestOptions, cancellationToken);
39
+ }
40
+

44

+ /// <summary>Vend credentials for a connected account</summary>
68
+ /// <remarks>
69
+ /// Returns credentials for a user's connected account. Branches on the installation's `auth_method`: OAuth installations return an access token (refreshed if needed); API-key installations return the stored secret.
70
+ /// </remarks>
71
+ /// <param name="slug">The identifier of the integration.</param>
72
+ /// <param name="options">Request options.</param>
73
+ /// <param name="requestOptions">Per-request configuration overrides.</param>
74
+ /// <param name="cancellationToken">Cancellation token.</param>
75
+ /// <returns>The <see cref="DataIntegrationCredentialsResponse"/> result.</returns>
76
+ public virtual async Task<DataIntegrationCredentialsResponse> CreateDataIntegrationCredentialAsync(string slug, PipesCreateDataIntegrationCredentialOptions options, RequestOptions? requestOptions = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
77
+ {
78
+ return await this.PostAsync<DataIntegrationCredentialsResponse>($"/data-integrations/{Uri.EscapeDataString(slug)}/credentials", options, requestOptions, cancellationToken);
79
+ }
80
+

+ [Fact]
30
+ public async Task TestUpdateDataIntegrationApiKeyAsync()
31
+ {
32
+ var fixture = System.IO.File.ReadAllText("testdata/connected_account.json");
33
+ this.httpMock.MockResponse(HttpMethod.Put, "/data-integrations/test_slug/api-key", HttpStatusCode.OK, fixture);
34
+ var options = new PipesUpdateDataIntegrationApiKeyOptions();
35
+ options.UserId = "test_user_id";
36
+ options.Secret = "test_secret";
37
+ var result = await this.service.UpdateDataIntegrationApiKeyAsync("test_slug", options);
38
+ Assert.NotNull(result);
39
+ Assert.Equal("data_installation_01EHZNVPK3SFK441A1RGBFSHRT", result.Id);
40
+ Assert.Equal("2024-01-16T14:20:00.000Z", result.CreatedAt);
41
+ Assert.Equal("2024-01-16T14:20:00.000Z", result.UpdatedAt);
42
+ this.httpMock.AssertRequestWasMade(HttpMethod.Put, "/data-integrations/test_slug/api-key");
43
+ await this.httpMock.AssertRequestBodyContainsAsync("user_id", "test_user_id");
44
+ await this.httpMock.AssertRequestBodyContainsAsync("secret", "test_secret");
45
+ }
46

+ func TestPipes_UpdateDataIntegrationAPIKey(t *testing.T) {
19
+ server := httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
20
+ require.Equal(t, "PUT", r.Method)
21
+ require.Equal(t, "/data-integrations/test_slug/api-key", r.URL.Path)
22
+ body, _ := io.ReadAll(r.Body)
23
+ var bodyMap map[string]interface{}
24
+ require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(body, &bodyMap))
25
+ w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
26
+ w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
27
+ fixture, err := os.ReadFile("testdata/connected_account.json")
28
+ if err != nil {
29
+ t.Fatalf("failed to read fixture: %v", err)

+ type DataIntegrationCredentialsResponse struct {

+ // Active indicates credentials are available.

4351
+ // Credential is the credential object containing the vended secret.
4352

4353
+ // Error is the reason credentials are unavailable. Additional values may be added in the future; handle unknown values gracefully.
4354
+ // - `"not_installed"`: The user does not have the integration installed.
4355

24
  class Pipes(
25
  internal val workos: WorkOS
26
  ) {
27
+ /**
28
+ * Upsert an API key for a connected account
29
+ *
30
+ * Creates or updates an API-key-based installation for the specified integration and user. If an installation already exists, the stored API key is rotated to the new value.
31
+ *
32
+ * @param slug The identifier of the integration.
33
+ * @param userId A [User](https://workos.com/docs/reference/authkit/user) identifier.
34
+ * @param secret The API key secret to store for this integration.
35
+ * @param organizationId An [Organization](https://workos.com/docs/reference/organization) identifier. Optional parameter to scope the connection to a specific organization.
36
+ * @param requestOptions per-request overrides (idempotency key, API key, headers, timeout)
37
+ *
38
+ * @return the ConnectedAccount
39
+ */
40
+ @JvmOverloads
41
+ fun updateDataIntegrationApiKey(
42
+ slug: String,
43
+ userId: String,
44
+ secret: String,
45
+ organizationId: String? = null,
46
+ requestOptions: RequestOptions? = null
47
+ ): ConnectedAccount {
48
+ val body =
49
+ bodyOf(
50
+ "user_id" to userId,
51
+ "secret" to secret,
52
+ "organization_id" to organizationId
53
+ )
54
+ val config =
55
+ RequestConfig(
56
+ method = "PUT",
57
+ path = "/data-integrations/${encodePathSegment(slug)}/api-key",
58
+ body = body,
59
+ requestOptions = requestOptions
60
+ )
61
+ return workos.baseClient.request(config, ConnectedAccount::class.java)
62
+ }
63
+
64
+ /**
65
+ * Coroutine-aware variant of [updateDataIntegrationApiKey]. Use this from
66
+ * a `suspend` function or coroutine scope.
67
+ *
68
+ * Delegates to the blocking [updateDataIntegrationApiKey] under
69
+ * `withContext(Dispatchers.IO)`, so this is safe to call from any
70
+ * coroutine dispatcher (including `Dispatchers.Main`).
71
+ */
72
+ @JvmName("updateDataIntegrationApiKeySuspend")
73
+ suspend fun updateDataIntegrationApiKeySuspend(
74
+ slug: String,
75
+ userId: String,
76
+ secret: String,
77
+ organizationId: String? = null,
78
+ requestOptions: RequestOptions? = null
79
+ ): ConnectedAccount =
80
+ withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
81
+ updateDataIntegrationApiKey(slug, userId, secret, organizationId, requestOptions)
82
+ }
83
+
84
  /**
85
  * Get authorization URL
86
  *
 
138
  authorizeDataIntegration(slug, userId, organizationId, returnTo, requestOptions)
139
  }
140
 
141
+ /**
142
+ * Vend credentials for a connected account
143
+ *
144
+ * Returns credentials for a user's connected account. Branches on the installation's `auth_method`: OAuth installations return an access token (refreshed if needed); API-key installations return the stored secret.
145
+ *
146
+ * @param slug The identifier of the integration.
147
+ * @param userId A [User](https://workos.com/docs/reference/authkit/user) identifier.
148
+ * @param organizationId An [Organization](https://workos.com/docs/reference/organization) identifier. Optional parameter to scope the connection to a specific organization.
149
+ * @param requestOptions per-request overrides (idempotency key, API key, headers, timeout)
150
+ *
151
+ * @return the DataIntegrationCredentialsResponse
152
+ */
153
+ @JvmOverloads
154
+ fun createDataIntegrationCredential(
155
+ slug: String,
156
+ userId: String,
157
+ organizationId: String? = null,
158
+ requestOptions: RequestOptions? = null
159
+ ): DataIntegrationCredentialsResponse {
160
+ val body =
161
+ bodyOf(
162
+ "user_id" to userId,
163
+ "organization_id" to organizationId
164
+ )
165
+ val config =
166
+ RequestConfig(
167
+ method = "POST",
168
+ path = "/data-integrations/${encodePathSegment(slug)}/credentials",
169
+ body = body,
170
+ requestOptions = requestOptions
171
+ )
172
+ return workos.baseClient.request(config, DataIntegrationCredentialsResponse::class.java)
173
+ }
174
+
175
+ /**
176
+ * Coroutine-aware variant of [createDataIntegrationCredential]. Use this from
177
+ * a `suspend` function or coroutine scope.
178
+ *
179
+ * Delegates to the blocking [createDataIntegrationCredential] under
180
+ * `withContext(Dispatchers.IO)`, so this is safe to call from any
181
+ * coroutine dispatcher (including `Dispatchers.Main`).
182
+ */
183
+ @JvmName("createDataIntegrationCredentialSuspend")
184
+ suspend fun createDataIntegrationCredentialSuspend(
185
+ slug: String,
186
+ userId: String,
187
+ organizationId: String? = null,
188
+ requestOptions: RequestOptions? = null
189
+ ): DataIntegrationCredentialsResponse =
190
+ withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
191
+ createDataIntegrationCredential(slug, userId, organizationId, requestOptions)
192
+ }
193
+

195

+ /**
23
+ * Upsert an API key for a connected account
24
+ *
25
+ * Creates or updates an API-key-based installation for the specified integration and user. If an installation already exists, the stored API key is rotated to the new value.
26
+ * @param string $slug The identifier of the integration.
27
+ * @param string $userId A [User](https://workos.com/docs/reference/authkit/user) identifier.
28
+ * @param string|null $organizationId An [Organization](https://workos.com/docs/reference/organization) identifier. Optional parameter to scope the connection to a specific organization.
29
+ * @param string $secret The API key secret to store for this integration.
30
+ * @return \WorkOS\Resource\ConnectedAccount
31
+ * @throws \WorkOS\Exception\WorkOSException
32
+ */
33
+ public function updateDataIntegrationApiKey(
34
+ string $slug,
35
+ string $userId,
36
+ string $secret,
37

88

89

90

94

103
+ 'user_id' => $userId,
104

109
+ body: $body,
110
+ options: $options,
111
+ );
112

113

35
+ """Upsert an API key for a connected account
36
+
37
+ Creates or updates an API-key-based installation for the specified integration and user. If an installation already exists, the stored API key is rotated to the new value.
38
+
39
+ Args:
40
+ slug: The identifier of the integration.
41
+ user_id: A [User](https://workos.com/docs/reference/authkit/user) identifier.
42
+ organization_id: An [Organization](https://workos.com/docs/reference/organization) identifier. Optional parameter to scope the connection to a specific organization.
43
+ secret: The API key secret to store for this integration.
44
+ request_options: Per-request options. Supports extra_headers, timeout, max_retries, and base_url override.
45
+
46
+ Returns:
47
+ ConnectedAccount
48
+
49
+ Raises:
50
+ BadRequestError: If the request is malformed (400).
51
+ AuthenticationError: If the API key is invalid (401).
52
+ AuthorizationError: If the request is forbidden (403).
53
+ NotFoundError: If the resource is not found (404).
54
+ UnprocessableEntityError: If the request data is unprocessable (422).
55
+ RateLimitExceededError: If rate limited (429).
56
+ ServerError: If the server returns a 5xx error.
57
+ """
58

59
+ k: v
60

61
+ "user_id": user_id,
62

63
+ "secret": secret,
64
+ }.items()
65
+ if v is not None
66
+ }
67
+ return self._client.request(
68
+ method="put",
69
+ path=("data-integrations", str(slug), "api-key"),
70
+ body=body,
71
+ model=ConnectedAccount,
72
+ request_options=request_options,
73

+ user_id: str
15
+ """A [User](https://workos.com/docs/reference/authkit/user) identifier."""
16
+ organization_id: Optional[str] = None
17
+ """An [Organization](https://workos.com/docs/reference/organization) identifier. Optional parameter to scope the connection to a specific organization."""
18
+
19
+ @classmethod
20
+ def from_dict(
21
+ cls, data: Dict[str, Any]
22
+ ) -> "DataIntegrationsVendCredentialsRequest":
23
+ """Deserialize from a dictionary."""
24

25

26
+ user_id=data["user_id"],

28

29
+ except (KeyError, ValueError) as e:
30
+ _raise_deserialize_error("DataIntegrationsVendCredentialsRequest", e)
31
+
32
+ def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
33
+ """Serialize to a dictionary."""
34
+ result: Dict[str, Any] = {}
35
+ result["user_id"] = self.user_id
36
+ if self.organization_id is not None:
37
+ result["organization_id"] = self.organization_id
38
+ return result

  with pytest.raises(ServerError):
452
+ await workos.pipes.update_data_integration_api_key(
453
+ "test_slug", user_id="test_user_id", secret="test_secret"
454

455

456

+ @dataclass(slots=True)
11
+ class AuthMethodMismatchError:
12
+ """Auth Method Mismatch Error model."""
13
+
14
+ code: Literal["auth_method_mismatch"]
15
+ """Error code indicating the endpoint does not match the installation auth method."""
16

20

31

32

33

34

35

+ class ConnectedAccount:
15
+ """Connected Account model."""
16
+
17
+ object: Literal["connected_account"]
18
+ """Distinguishes the connected account object."""
19
+ id: str
20
+ """The unique identifier of the connected account."""
21
+ user_id: Optional[str]
22
+ """The [User](https://workos.com/docs/reference/authkit/user) identifier associated with this connection."""
23
+ organization_id: Optional[str]
24
+ """The [Organization](https://workos.com/docs/reference/organization) identifier associated with this connection, or `null` if not scoped to an organization."""
25
+ scopes: List[str]
26
+ """The OAuth scopes granted for this connection."""
27
+ state: "ConnectedAccountState"
28
+ """The state of the connected account:
29
+ - `connected`: The connection is active and tokens are valid.
30
+ - `needs_reauthorization`: The user needs to reauthorize the connection, typically because required scopes have changed.
31
+ - `disconnected`: The connection has been disconnected."""
32
+ created_at: str
33
+ """The timestamp when the connection was created."""
34
+ updated_at: str
35
+ """The timestamp when the connection was last updated."""
36
+ auth_method: Optional["ConnectedAccountAuthMethod"] = None
37
+ """The authentication method used for this connection (`oauth` or `api_key`). Defaults to `oauth` if absent."""
38
+ api_key_last_4: Optional[str] = None
39
+ """The last four characters of the API key, or `null` for OAuth connections."""
40

56
